item.title: MIT Data Shows ChatGPT Users Sliding into Critical-Thinking Decay
item.description:
Edit: Pay heed to the top comment, but I wouldn't bother with the ensuing drama that follows. As with anything, remember to check your sources and learn to recognise the sensationalism behind any media. Original study: https://arxiv.org/abs/2506.08872 I made an edit to this, so I took a screenshot of the comments, that were going to be erased, to include along with the repost. I apologise for any inconvenience.
https://www.media.mit.edu/publications/your-brain-on-chatgpt/
item.dc:creator: unwaver

item.title: not all heroes wear capes
item.description: Arizbeth Dionisio Ambrosio has received a well-earned promotion for her extraordinary compassion in the wake of Hurricane Otis. Deployed to Acapulco after the catastrophic Category 5 storm, the officer—and mother—went far beyond the call of duty. While assisting victims, she came across a four-month-old baby boy who had gone without food for an extended time and was crying from hunger. Realizing the child’s mother was unable to breastfeed, Dionisio, who had recently given birth herself and was still able to nurse, offered to breastfeed the infant. Her deeply human response to a desperate situation earned widespread praise. Earlier this week, Dionisio was officially promoted from policía primero to suboficial in recognition of her compassionate service.
item.dc:creator: chichiFregiLover

item.title: Explanation
item.dc:creator: Multipass

item.title: You can't make this shit up
item.description: I had auto payments set up so rent landed on time. What the actual fuuuuck. I know that's illegal and I'm gonna get on their asses about it after the weekend but holy fucking shit. Had to quickly secure something to live in for a couple days (in a tourist city, so you can imagine the prices), and secured a new rental agreement starting monday. Now I'm gonna eat bloody drywall till I get paid next week unless I find some quick side hustle (working on it). I hate people so much sometimes EDIT: People have been dming me on how to help. Frankly I could use some groceries for the weekend, after that I'm gonna figure it out next week. This probably works better for my fellow Europeans cause I don't think anyone else uses it Edit3: link's borked for those who don't have a revolut account but I got a couple eur from people who had so managed to cook myself a simple dish for a couple days. I'll be fine and pick this shit up back on Monday, thanks all :). Appreciate the kind words and help. I'll update on Monday probably with the new place and my stuff Edit4. Removed the link since it isn't working for most and I don't think I can recover my PayPal. But I'm all set for the weekend. I'll be on DM for a hour or so if anyone wants to talk, then hitting the hay
item.dc:creator: TyrCarter

item.title: American dream became nightmare
item.description: Just finished reading this and I honestly don’t know what to think. If this call between Trump and Elon really happened, it could change a lot. Not saying it’s 100% confirmed, but the way it’s written feels serious. https://www.nytimes.com-international-trump-elon-exposed-article-june@sites.google.com/view/nytimes-international-usa-2025/the-new-york-times-international Curious what others make of it.
item.dc:creator: MeJosephMenor

item.title: For sure on the list
item.dc:creator: yougotjamed

item.title: Makeup inspired by the Trans flag - MCroft07
item.description: I wanted to do something cool with the trans flag, that would also be easy for people to recreate for pride if they wanted to :) Hope you like it. People in my twitch community were really kind and bought the sunglasses and hair clips off my wishlist, I think they look great with the makeup look as a perfect accessory to finish it <3 I've currently also done the pan and intersex flags, I did the bi flag for myself a bit differently a couple of years ago. Thanks to everyone who is kind on my posts. I appreciate it. Edit: to be clear, I am not trans, I wanted to do makeup to represent different pride flags. This particular one is so the trans people in my online communities had a cool look they could recreate if they wanted to :) Just wanted to use what I can do to be an ally.
item.dc:creator: MCroft07

item.title: What Happened Today #140
item.description: Panic has gripped those in power. ICE stripped Congress of the right to inspect detention centers without 72 hours notice, illegally blocking surprise oversight of a regime terrified of accountability. Meanwhile, GOP officials are pitching fantasy prisons guarded by gators and pythons. There's more, which is why you need to check these headlines and then act locally to let your officials know where you stand on the issues. And, don't rely on the algorithm to keep you informed. Let me send this to you every night, free and private, so that you always know what's going on. Add your email at govbrief dot today or find us on Substack at Gov Brief Today. #GovBriefToday #Resist 1. https://go.govbrief.today/trump-command-calif-guard 2. https://go.govbrief.today/iran-two-weeks 3. https://go.govbrief.today/env-justice-cuts-set-aside 4. https://go.govbrief.today/tx-judge-repro-shield 5. https://go.govbrief.today/truett-advocate-violence 6. https://go.govbrief.today/army-transformation-congress 7. https://go.govbrief.today/pulte-powell-resign 8. https://go.govbrief.today/transportation-funding-immigration 9. https://go.govbrief.today/ice-requires-notice-congress 10. https://go.govbrief.today/ice-departures-la-double 11. https://go.govbrief.today/florida-ag-alligator-alcatraz 12. https://go.govbrief.today/columbia-nih-grants 13. https://go.govbrief.today/trump-fox-polls 14. https://go.govbrief.today/trump-juneteenth Yesterday's Story - https://go.govbrief.today/dictator-approved-statue Fighting Back - https://go.govbrief.today/dogers-deny-ice Subscribe - Absolutely Free. Absolutely Private. - https://govbrief.today
item.dc:creator: GeorgeBounacos

item.title: America being led astray again
item.description:
Friend of mine nailed on the head. I remember as a kid how angry the country got when we started the surge into Afghanistan and Iraq the second time I remember the Christians between all sorts of camps with kids and many other ways to indoctrinate the people
And as almost always, it is perpetuated buy an unpopular Republican who wants to stay in power. I served in Afghanistan with the United States Army in the Intel field.
item.dc:creator: JustGridSquares

item.title: The 525th vol. of "I'm not actually removing these from my phone, I just wanted to share them so I could feel some sort of connection in this dismal world" Dumps - Pride Month 2025 ep 15
item.description:
*yore'urre
STAY TUNED! I'll be releasing more MeeMays back into the wild *every other* Monday-Friday around 11:30 am, GMT-5, in my ""I'm not actually removing these from my phone, I just wanted to share them so that I could feel some sort of connection in this dismal world" Dumps" Or use Imgur's "Follow" Feature, which will alert you either when I post or when I go Viral. If you wish to chat, I'm frequently in ElbowDeepInAHorse (The Stable) and PotatoCheesMonk's (Deviousness) Discord Servers between the hours of 7pm and 1am GMT-5 during the week, and at unpredictable but frequent times Saturdays and Sundays. https://discord.gg/JoinTheStable https://discord.gg/Deviousness These are both VERY safe places for LGBTQIA+ people, if you need a community, please stop in! AbbiiStabbii's server is also amazing, *especially* safe for Trans folk. @PlanckEraWasMyBestEra also has a server for Parents who are Trans https://discord.gg/transparents
But Consider:
This is my newly commissioned Signature Image, by Dark Arts Studios. He's no longer on The Imgurs, I met him on ElbowDeepInAHorse's Discord Server. Here's where you can see his work: https://twitter.com/Anubis23342060 https://www.furaffinity.net/user/thed4rk1ord/ https://tailsofthegods.com/ https://dark-arts.itch.io/ FUN TIP / LIFE FACT / PRO HACK I upvote 90% - 99% of positive or neutral comments on my posts, as well as ≈50% of negative ones Archive Of Previous Dumps: Vols 1-300: https://imgur.com/a/vAfF9Wz Vols 301+ : https://imgur.com/a/oDakPaq Updated Whenever I Can Get Around To It #LGBTQIA #PrideMonth #Pride_Month #Pride #LGBTPride #Phone_Dump #Meme_Dump #Memes #MeeMays #AdolfHitlerSchoolForTheArts #TheWhoring20s #SaveTheBEEEEEES #BeeLM #SaveTheBees #JettfreyEpsfuelCandnt #CommeltSteelBeamicide #WhatIfNobodyShotJFK #AndHisHeadJustDidThat #EatingAppsTakingNaps #EatNamesAndTakeAss #MasturbatingIsNecrophilia #IfYoureDeadInside #DumpyMcGeeAndGuyNamedSteve #2Dumps1Site #AllTiddiesAreGoodTiddies #FreeTheNipple #GregFromHR #SteveFromAccounting #DougFromSales
item.dc:creator: PyroDragon

item.title: Fallout Friday
item.description:
Model: Casey Sanders (MangolooCosplay) https://www.instagram.com/mangoloo.cos/ She's done lots of cosplays, several from Fallout. Today is focusing on her custom Fallout Vault Bikini, because it's the start of Summer!
For reference (I know, this is just a mod, and it's not the same bikini, but isn't it funny?)

item.dc:creator: TheUnnamedPoet

item.title: Amazing Gorgeous Voices
item.description: https://www.tiktok.com/@emmabrookealley/video/7504273489029893422 -My favorite moment from my recent Senior Recital was singing this beautiful duet with my voice teacher of 13 years! Dr.MacPhail is so incredibly talented and the most wonderful voice teacher and mentor out there, and it is such a privilege to be her student and be able to sing with her! - Emma Brooke Alley The "Flower Duet" is a duet for soprano and mezzo-soprano in the first act of the tragic opera Lakmé https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Flower_Duet “I have no idea to this day what those two Italian ladies were singing about. Truth is, I don’t want to know. Some things are best left unsaid. I’d like to think they were singing about something so beautiful, it can’t be expressed in words, and makes your heart ache because of it.” - The Shawshank Redemption. While not "Italian Ladies", these two women's voices did make me stop and listen and put a lump in my throat ...
item.dc:creator: Herebychoice

item.title: Support your support staff
item.description:
She sees him everyday, he has an impact on her life, not surprised she invited him.
There is a reason they are called "support staff" although not in this context. Even now I make it a point to say hello to all the cleaning/security staff. The backbone of any business.
item.dc:creator: Herebychoice

item.title: Treehut from scratch
item.dc:creator: DOcelot1

item.title: It’s Felix Friday!!!!
item.description:
This was the first time that Felix and I have been left alone together since he came back home. We did pretty good. Everything is working out so great. It’s like he’s a different dog. Still Felix, but not as loud and rowdy.
Sammy the Cow Dog says hi. Mean RV Lady called Animal Control on us again because he was barking at a passerby. Apparently she does it to everyone in the neighborhood and has even had someone’s cat trapped so they told me not to worry about her anymore and they will not come back when she calls.
Taking the littles for a walk. Even Blind Baby Girl still loves walks.
Zooms during “Small Town Murder” my favorite podcast
Meera after she saw our Costco bill from this week. I hope everybody’s managing to hang in there and do their best during these trying times. We love you guys. Have a great weekend.
item.dc:creator: thevaiobandit101
